overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval military encampment at night. The character progresses from a wooded outer perimeter through torch-lit camp grounds, passing soldiers and tents, before ascending a cobblestone ramp toward a large stone tower under a full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded military camp perimeter with wooden palisades

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the outer camp perimeter, flanked by wooden stakes and sparse trees

notable_agents.action: armored soldier holding a torch standing guard beside the wooden palisade

entered.detail: rows of sharpened wooden stakes and log barriers lining the path
sparse deciduous trees with bare branches against the night sky
burning torches mounted on wooden posts providing warm orange light
red fabric flags hanging from wooden poles marking the camp boundary

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through the outer perimeter of a military camp, following a narrow dirt path lined with wooden palisades and burning torches. The area is sparsely populated with a few standing guards, and leafless trees are visible in the background under the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open military camp ground with canvas tents

events.description: full moon becomes visible in the night sky as the camera emerges from tree cover into the open camp

agents.ego_description: walking through the main camp area passing clusters of soldiers and canvas tents

notable_agents.action: group of soldiers in red armor gathered around a tent entrance

entered.detail: canvas military tents with wooden pole frames set up in the camp
large cylindrical stone tower visible in the distance, the destination ahead
bright full moon illuminating the scene with pale blue light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider camp area where the full moon becomes visible, casting pale light across the grounds. Geralt passes military tents and groups of soldiers standing guard, with the distant stone tower now clearly visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open approach to the fortress tower

events.description: mounted soldier on horseback rides past from right to left, temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the tower as a mounted patrol passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: mounted soldier in red armor riding a dark horse past the camera

entered.detail: stacks of wooden barrels and supply crates along the path edge
tall wooden pole with a dark flag waving in the wind

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses the open ground approaching the tower, passing wooden supply barrels and a flag pole. A mounted soldier rides past from the right, and the stone tower grows larger in the frame as the distance closes.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep cobblestone ramp leading to the fortress tower entrance

events.description: transition from dirt ground onto the cobblestone ramp ascending toward the tower

agents.ego_description: walking up the steep cobblestone ramp toward the tower entrance, passing archers and guards stationed along the walls

notable_agents.action: archer standing guard with bow drawn, watching from the right side of the ramp

entered.detail: steep cobblestone ramp with irregular stones leading upward to the tower
rough wooden fence railings along the sides of the ramp
stone parapets and defensive walls lining the ascending path

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends the steep cobblestone ramp toward the tower entrance, flanked by wooden railings and stone walls. Archers and guards stand watch along the parapets as the character climbs higher, with the massive stone tower now dominating the center of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded, wooded perimeter of a military camp toward the imposing height of a central stone tower under a full moon. It begins along a narrow dirt path lined with wooden palisades and burning torches, passing a few guards beneath leafless trees. As the path opens into a wider camp area, the pale moonlight illuminates military tents and groups of soldiers while the distant tower comes into clear view. The scene then expands across open ground past supply barrels and a passing mounted soldier, with the stone structure growing larger in the frame. Finally, the camera ascends a steep cobblestone ramp flanked by railings and guards on the parapets, ending as the massive tower dominates the center of the view.
